data.content: Approved implementation review: abortSession now escalates directly to SIGKILL on the process group instead of gating on leader liveness, which covers the reported leader-exits-descendant-survives termination failure. Added regression coverage in src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-abort.test.ts for the forced group-kill path. No invariants were defined for this knot. Validation passed on work/foolery-e0cc at fdccf8a3: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
